question: 'आंध्र प्रदेश' राज्य में स्थित सभी जिलों के नाम, जिला नाम के अनुसार वर्णानुक्रम में व्यवस्थित करें।
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID WHERE T2.STATE_NAME = 'Andhra Pradesh' ORDER BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME
evidence: Filter `dim_state` where `dim_state`.`state_name` = 'Andhra Pradesh' (Hindi 'आंध्र प्रदेश' maps to English). Join with `dim_district` on `dim_district`.`state_id` = `dim_state`.`state_id`. Select `dim_district`.`district_name` and order by `dim_district`.`district_name` alphabetically.

question: 'आंध्र प्रदेश' राज्य के लिए जिलों के नाम सूचीबद्ध करें, जिले के नाम के अनुसार वर्णानुक्रम में समूहीकृत और क्रमबद्ध।
sql: SELECT T3.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_COUNTRY AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.COUNTRY_ID = T2.COUNTRY_ID INNER JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.STATE_ID = T3.STATE_ID WHERE T2.STATE_NAME = 'Andhra Pradesh' GROUP BY T3.DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY T3.DISTRICT_NAME ASC
evidence: Filter `dim_state` where (`dim_state`.`state_name`) = 'Andhra Pradesh'. Join with `dim_district` on (`dim_state`.`state_id`) = (`dim_district`.`state_id`). Select distinct (`dim_district`.`district_name`). Order by (`dim_district`.`district_name`) ASC.

question: प्रत्येक राज्य का नाम और उससे जुड़े जिला आईडी की कुल संख्या सूचीबद्ध करें, सबसे अधिक जिलों वाले राज्य से सबसे कम जिलों वाले राज्य के क्रम में।
sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, COUNT(T2.DISTRICT_ID) FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID GROUP BY T1.STATE_NAME ORDER BY COUNT(T2.DISTRICT_ID) DESC
evidence: List each `dim_state.state_name` and the COUNT of distinct `dim_district.district_id` associated via `dim_district.state_id` = `dim_state.state_id`. Group by `dim_state.state_name` and order by the count DESC (most districts to least).

question: 'भारत' नामक देश के लिए, प्रत्येक राज्य का नाम उस राज्य में जिलों की कुल संख्या के साथ सूचीबद्ध करें, यह सुनिश्चित करते हुए कि केवल उन राज्यों को शामिल किया जाए जिनमें कम से कम एक जिला हो और परिणामों को जिलों की संख्या के अनुसार उच्चतम से निम्नतम क्रम में व्यवस्थित किया जाए।
sql: SELECT T2.STATE_NAME, COUNT(T3.DISTRICT_ID) FROM DIM_COUNTRY AS T1 JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.COUNTRY_ID = T2.COUNTRY_ID JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.STATE_ID = T3.STATE_ID WHERE T1.COUNTRY_NAME = 'India' GROUP BY T2.STATE_NAME HAVING COUNT(T3.DISTRICT_ID) > 0 ORDER BY COUNT(T3.DISTRICT_ID) DESC;
evidence: Filter `dim_country` for `dim_country.country_name` = 'India'. Join `dim_state` on `dim_state.country_id` = `dim_country.country_id`. Join `dim_district` on `dim_district.state_id` = `dim_state.state_id`. Group by `dim_state.state_name` and count `dim_district.district_id` as district_count. Order by district_count DESC.

question: आंध्र प्रदेश राज्य में स्थित सभी जिलों के नाम, जिला नाम के अनुसार वर्णानुक्रम में व्यवस्थित, सूचीबद्ध करें।
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID WHERE T2.STATE_NAME = 'Andhra Pradesh' ORDER BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME
evidence: Select `dim_district`.`district_name` from `dim_district` join `dim_state` on `dim_district`.`state_id` = `dim_state`.`state_id` where `dim_state`.`state_name` = 'Andhra Pradesh' order by `dim_district`.`district_name` asc.

question: 'आंध्र प्रदेश' राज्य में स्थित जिलों के नाम सूचीबद्ध करें, जिले के नाम से समूहीकृत और वर्णमाला के अनुसार जिले के नाम से क्रमबद्ध।
sql: SELECT T3.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_COUNTRY AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.COUNTRY_ID = T2.COUNTRY_ID INNER JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.STATE_ID = T3.STATE_ID WHERE T2.STATE_NAME = 'Andhra Pradesh' GROUP BY T3.DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY T3.DISTRICT_NAME ASC
evidence: Select `dim_district`.`district_name` from `dim_district` inner join `dim_state` on `dim_district`.`state_id` = `dim_state`.`state_id` where `dim_state`.`state_name` = 'Andhra Pradesh' group by `dim_district`.`district_name` order by `dim_district`.`district_name`.

question: 'भारत' नामक देश के लिए, ज़िले का नाम और राज्य का नाम सूचीबद्ध करें, जो राज्य के नाम के अनुसार वर्णमाला क्रम में और फिर ज़िले के नाम के अनुसार क्रमबद्ध हों।
sql: SELECT T3.DISTRICT_NAME, T2.STATE_NAME FROM DIM_COUNTRY AS T1 JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.COUNTRY_ID = T2.COUNTRY_ID JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.STATE_ID = T3.STATE_ID WHERE T1.COUNTRY_NAME = 'India' ORDER BY T2.STATE_NAME, T3.DISTRICT_NAME
evidence: Filter `dim_country.country_name` = 'India', join `dim_country` to `dim_state` on `dim_country.country_id` = `dim_state.country_id`, join `dim_state` to `dim_district` on `dim_state.state_id` = `dim_district.state_id`, select `dim_district.district_name` and `dim_state.state_name`, order by `dim_state.state_name` ASC, then `dim_district.district_name` ASC.

question: 'चित्तूर' नामक जिलों के लिए देश का नाम, राज्य का नाम और जिले का नाम सूचीबद्ध करें, यह सुनिश्चित करते हुए कि इन प्रविष्टियों के लिए कम से कम एक देश रिकॉर्ड मौजूद हो, और परिणामों को पहले राज्य के नाम से और फिर देश के नाम से वर्णानुक्रम में व्यवस्थित करें।
sql: SELECT T3.COUNTRY_NAME, T2.STATE_NAME, T1.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID INNER JOIN DIM_COUNTRY AS T3 ON T2.COUNTRY_ID = T3.COUNTRY_ID WHERE T1.DISTRICT_NAME = 'Chittoor' GROUP BY T3.COUNTRY_NAME, T2.STATE_NAME, T1.DISTRICT_NAME HAVING COUNT(T3.COUNTRY_ID) >= 1 ORDER BY T2.STATE_NAME ASC, T3.COUNTRY_NAME ASC
evidence: Select `dim_country`.`country_name`, `dim_state`.`state_name`, `dim_district`.`district_name` from `dim_district` inner join `dim_state` on `dim_district`.`state_id` = `dim_state`.`state_id` inner join `dim_country` on `dim_state`.`country_id` = `dim_country`.`country_id` where `dim_district`.`district_name` = 'Chittoor' order by `dim_state`.`state_name` asc, `dim_country`.`country_name` asc.

question: राज्य के नाम और प्रत्येक राज्य के जिला आईडी की कुल संख्या सूचीबद्ध करें, जिलों की संख्या के अनुसार अवरोही क्रम में क्रमबद्ध करें, और केवल शीर्ष 5 परिणाम दिखाएँ।
sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, COUNT(T2.DISTRICT_ID) FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID GROUP BY T1.STATE_NAME ORDER BY COUNT(T2.DISTRICT_ID) DESC LIMIT 5
evidence: List `dim_state`.`state_name` and count of `dim_district`.`district_id` for each state. Join `dim_state` and `dim_district` on `dim_state`.`state_id` = `dim_district`.`state_id`. Group by `dim_state`.`state_id`, `dim_state`.`state_name`. Order by count descending. Limit to 5.

question: 'भारत' देश में प्रत्येक राज्य के लिए राज्य के नाम और जिला आईडी की कुल संख्या सूचीबद्ध करें, केवल उन राज्यों को शामिल करें जिनमें शून्य से अधिक जिले हैं, और सबसे अधिक जिलों वाले शीर्ष 5 राज्यों को प्रदर्शित करें।
sql: SELECT T2.STATE_NAME, COUNT(T3.DISTRICT_ID) FROM DIM_COUNTRY AS T1 JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.COUNTRY_ID = T2.COUNTRY_ID JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.STATE_ID = T3.STATE_ID WHERE T1.COUNTRY_NAME = 'India' GROUP BY T2.STATE_NAME HAVING COUNT(T3.DISTRICT_ID) > 0 ORDER BY COUNT(T3.DISTRICT_ID) DESC LIMIT 5
evidence: Filter `dim_country`.`country_name` = 'India'. Join `dim_state` on `dim_country`.`country_id` = `dim_state`.`country_id`. Join `dim_district` on `dim_state`.`state_id` = `dim_district`.`state_id`. Group by `dim_state`.`state_id`, `dim_state`.`state_name`. Count distinct `dim_district`.`district_id` as district_count. Keep only district_count > 0. Order by district_count DESC, limit 5.

question: सभी प्रविष्टियों के लिए जिले का नाम, राज्य का नाम और देश का नाम सूचीबद्ध करें, जिले के नाम के अनुसार वर्णमाला क्रम में व्यवस्थित करें।
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME, T2.STATE_NAME, T3.COUNTRY_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID JOIN DIM_COUNTRY AS T3 ON T2.COUNTRY_ID = T3.COUNTRY_ID ORDER BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME
evidence: Select `dim_district`.`district_name`, `dim_state`.`state_name`, `dim_country`.`country_name` from `dim_district` inner join `dim_state` on `dim_district`.`state_id` = `dim_state`.`state_id` inner join `dim_country` on `dim_state`.`country_id` = `dim_country`.`country_id` order by `dim_district`.`district_name`.

question: भारत के अंतर्गत असम, आंध्र प्रदेश, बिहार, अरुणाचल प्रदेश या अंडमान और निकोबार द्वीपसमूह राज्यों में स्थित सभी जिलों के लिए देश का नाम, राज्य का नाम और जिले का नाम सूचीबद्ध करें, जिन्हें देश, राज्य और जिले के अनुसार समूहित किया गया है और जिले के नाम के अनुसार वर्णानुक्रम में क्रमबद्ध किया गया है।
sql: SELECT T3.COUNTRY_NAME, T2.STATE_NAME, T1.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID INNER JOIN DIM_COUNTRY AS T3 ON T2.COUNTRY_ID = T3.COUNTRY_ID WHERE T3.COUNTRY_NAME = 'India' AND T2.STATE_NAME IN ('Assam', 'Andhra Pradesh', 'Bihar', 'Arunachal Pradesh', 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands') GROUP BY T3.COUNTRY_NAME, T2.STATE_NAME, T1.DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME ASC
evidence: Select `dim_country`.`country_name`, `dim_state`.`state_name`, `dim_district`.`district_name` from `dim_country` join `dim_state` on `dim_country`.`country_id` = `dim_state`.`country_id` join `dim_district` on `dim_state`.`state_id` = `dim_district`.`state_id` where `dim_state`.`state_name` IN ('Assam', 'Andhra Pradesh', 'Bihar', 'Arunachal Pradesh', 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands') group by `dim_country`.`country_name`, `dim_state`.`state_name`, `dim_district`.`district_name` order by `dim_district`.`district_name`;

question: भारत देश के उन राज्यों के नाम वर्णानुक्रम में सूचीबद्ध करें जिनमें कम से कम एक जिला 'चित्तूर' नाम का है लेकिन जिनमें 'निकोबार' नाम का कोई जिला नहीं है।
sql: SELECT T2.STATE_NAME FROM DIM_COUNTRY AS T1 JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.COUNTRY_ID = T2.COUNTRY_ID JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.STATE_ID = T3.STATE_ID WHERE T1.COUNTRY_NAME = 'India' GROUP BY T2.STATE_NAME HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN T3.DISTRICT_NAME = 'Chittoor' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 AND SUM(CASE WHEN T3.DISTRICT_NAME = 'Nicobars' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0 ORDER BY T2.STATE_NAME ASC
evidence: Find states where `dim_country.country_name` = 'India', and the state has at least one district with `dim_district.district_name` = 'Chittoor', but no district with `dim_district.district_name` = 'Nicobars'. Return `dim_state.state_name` in alphabetical order.

question: भारत में उन राज्यों के नाम सूचीबद्ध करें जिनमें 'चित्तूर' और 'प्रकाशम' दोनों जिले हैं, राज्य के नाम के अनुसार वर्णानुक्रम में क्रमबद्ध करें।
sql: SELECT T2.STATE_NAME FROM DIM_COUNTRY AS T1 JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.COUNTRY_ID = T2.COUNTRY_ID JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.STATE_ID = T3.STATE_ID WHERE T1.COUNTRY_NAME = 'India' GROUP BY T2.STATE_NAME HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN T3.DISTRICT_NAME = 'Chittoor' THEN T3.DISTRICT_ID END) > 0 AND COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN T3.DISTRICT_NAME = 'Prakasam' THEN T3.DISTRICT_ID END) > 0 ORDER BY T2.STATE_NAME ASC
evidence: Find `dim_state`.`state_name` where `dim_country`.`country_name` = 'India' and there exist districts named 'Chittoor' and 'Prakasam' in `dim_district`.`district_name` for that state. Join `dim_country` to `dim_state` on `dim_country`.`country_id` = `dim_state`.`country_id`, and `dim_state` to `dim_district` on `dim_state`.`state_id` = `dim_district`.`state_id`. Filter for districts 'Chittoor' and 'Prakasam', group by `dim_state`.`state_id`, `dim_state`.`state_name` having count(distinct `dim_district`.`district_name`) = 2. Order by `dim_state`.`state_name` alphabetically.

question: 'आंध्र प्रदेश' या 'असम' के राज्यों के लिए अद्वितीय राज्य नामों की सूची, राज्य के नाम के अनुसार वर्णानुक्रम में क्रमबद्ध।
sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.STATE_NAME FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Andhra Pradesh' OR T1.STATE_NAME = 'Assam' ORDER BY T1.STATE_NAME ASC
evidence: Select distinct `dim_state`.`state_name` from `dim_state` where `dim_state`.`state_name` in ('Andhra Pradesh', 'Assam') order by `dim_state`.`state_name`.

question: 'भारत' देश में स्थित अद्वितीय राज्यों के नामों की सूची बनाएं और उन्हें 'आंध्र प्रदेश' राज्य में पाए जाने वाले अद्वितीय जिलों के नामों की सूची के साथ जोड़ें।
sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.STATE_NAME FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_COUNTRY AS T2 ON T1.COUNTRY_ID = T2.COUNTRY_ID WHERE T2.COUNTRY_NAME = 'India' UNION SELECT DISTINCT T3.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T3 JOIN DIM_STATE AS T4 ON T3.STATE_ID = T4.STATE_ID WHERE T4.STATE_NAME = 'Andhra Pradesh';
evidence: Select distinct `dim_state`.`state_name` from `dim_state` inner join `dim_country` on `dim_country`.`country_id` = `dim_state`.`country_id` where `dim_country`.`country_name` = 'India'. Then select distinct `dim_district`.`district_name` from `dim_district` inner join `dim_state` on `dim_state`.`state_id` = `dim_district`.`state_id` where `dim_state`.`state_name` = 'Andhra Pradesh'. Combine both results into one column (likely using UNION).

question: 'आंध्र प्रदेश' राज्य में स्थित नगर निकाय, ग्राम पंचायत या गाँवों के नामों की सूची, गाँव के नाम के अनुसार वर्णमाला क्रम में समूहीकृत और व्यवस्थित करें।
sql: SELECT T3.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID JOIN DIM_LOCATION AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Andhra Pradesh' GROUP BY T3.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME ORDER BY T3.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME
evidence: Filter `dim_state.state_name` = 'Andhra Pradesh'. Join `dim_location` → `dim_district` → `dim_state`. Select distinct `dim_location.ulb_rlb_village_name`. Order by `dim_location.ulb_rlb_village_name`.

question: बिहार राज्य के लिए, गाँव के नाम (ULB/RLB) और उप-जिला नामों को, गाँव के नाम के अनुसार वर्णमाला क्रम में समूहित और व्यवस्थित करके सूचीबद्ध करें।
sql: SELECT T3.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME, T3.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID INNER JOIN DIM_LOCATION AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Bihar' GROUP BY T3.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME, T3.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY T3.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME ASC
evidence: Filter `dim_state.state_name` = 'Bihar'. Join `dim_state` to `dim_district` on `dim_state.state_id` = `dim_district.state_id`. Join `dim_district` to `dim_location` on `dim_district.district_id` = `dim_location.district_id`. Select `dim_location.ulb_rlb_village_name` and `dim_location.sub_district_name`. Group by both columns to get unique combinations. Order by `dim_location.ulb_rlb_village_name` ASC.

question: प्रत्येक राज्य का नाम और उससे जुड़े स्थान आईडी की गिनती सूचीबद्ध करें, राज्य के नाम से समूहित करें और सबसे अधिक से सबसे कम गिनती के क्रम में व्यवस्थित करें।
sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, COUNT(T3.LOCATION_ID) FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID JOIN DIM_LOCATION AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID GROUP BY T1.STATE_NAME ORDER BY COUNT(T3.LOCATION_ID) DESC
evidence: Count the number of `dim_location`.`location_id` for each `dim_state`.`state_name` by joining `dim_location` → `dim_district` → `dim_state`. Group by `dim_state`.`state_name` and order by count descending.

question: प्रत्येक राज्य का नाम और उस राज्य के लिए स्थान आईडी की कुल गणना सूचीबद्ध करें, केवल उन राज्यों पर ध्यान केंद्रित करें जिनके पास एक से अधिक स्थान आईडी हैं, और परिणामों को स्थान आईडी की गणना के अनुसार अवरोही क्रम में क्रमबद्ध करें।
sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, COUNT(T3.LOCATION_ID) FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID JOIN DIM_LOCATION AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID GROUP BY T1.STATE_NAME HAVING COUNT(T3.LOCATION_ID) > 1 ORDER BY COUNT(T3.LOCATION_ID) DESC
evidence: List `dim_state.state_name` and count of `dim_location.location_id` for each state. Join `dim_state` to `dim_district` on `dim_state.state_id` = `dim_district.state_id`, then join `dim_district` to `dim_location` on `dim_district.district_id` = `dim_location.district_id`. Group by `dim_state.state_name`. Filter to only states with count(`dim_location.location_id`) > 1. Order by count(`dim_location.location_id`) descending.

question: 'आंध्र प्रदेश' राज्य और 'चित्तूर' जिले में स्थित ULB, RLB या गाँवों के नामों की सूची बनाएं, जिन्हें गाँव के नाम के अनुसार वर्णमाला क्रम में समूहित और व्यवस्थित किया जाए।
sql: SELECT T3.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID JOIN DIM_LOCATION AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Andhra Pradesh' AND T2.DISTRICT_NAME = 'Chittoor' GROUP BY T3.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME ORDER BY T3.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME ASC
evidence: List `dim_location.ulb_rlb_village_name` for locations in `dim_state.state_name` = 'Andhra Pradesh' and `dim_district.district_name` = 'Chittoor', sorted alphabetically by `dim_location.ulb_rlb_village_name`.

question: 'आंध्र प्रदेश' राज्य और 'चित्तूर' जिले में स्थित यूएलबी आरएलबी गाँवों के नाम, गाँव के नाम के अनुसार वर्णमाला क्रम में समूहित और क्रमबद्ध करें।
sql: SELECT T3.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID INNER JOIN DIM_LOCATION AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Andhra Pradesh' AND T2.DISTRICT_NAME = 'Chittoor' GROUP BY T3.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME ORDER BY T3.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME ASC
evidence: Retrieve distinct `dim_location`.`ulb_rlb_village_name` for villages in state `dim_state`.`state_name` = 'Andhra Pradesh' and district `dim_district`.`district_name` = 'Chittoor'. Group by `dim_location`.`ulb_rlb_village_name` and order alphabetically.

question: सभी स्थानों के लिए राज्य का नाम, देश आईडी, जिले का नाम और यूएलबी/आरएलबी गाँव का नाम सूचीबद्ध करें, जिन्हें गाँव के नाम से और फिर जिले के नाम से क्रमबद्ध करें।
sql: SELECT T3.STATE_NAME, T3.COUNTRY_ID, T2.DISTRICT_NAME, T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_STATE AS T3 ON T2.STATE_ID = T3.STATE_ID ORDER BY T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME, T2.DISTRICT_NAME
evidence: Select `dim_state`.`state_name`, `dim_country`.`country_id`, `dim_district`.`district_name`, `dim_location`.`ulb_rlb_village_name` from `dim_location` join `dim_district` on `dim_location`.`district_id` = `dim_district`.`district_id` join `dim_state` on `dim_district`.`state_id` = `dim_state`.`state_id` join `dim_country` on `dim_state`.`country_id` = `dim_country`.`country_id` order by `dim_location`.`ulb_rlb_village_name`, `dim_district`.`district_name`.

question: राज्य का नाम, देश आईडी, जिले का नाम, और यूएलबी/आरएलबी गाँव का नाम सूचीबद्ध करें, इन चार विशेषताओं के आधार पर समूहीकृत करें और गाँव के नाम के बाद जिले के नाम के अनुसार वर्णानुक्रम में क्रमबद्ध करें।
sql: SELECT T3.STATE_NAME, T3.COUNTRY_ID, T2.DISTRICT_NAME, T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID INNER JOIN DIM_STATE AS T3 ON T2.STATE_ID = T3.STATE_ID GROUP BY T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME, T2.DISTRICT_NAME, T3.STATE_NAME, T3.COUNTRY_ID ORDER BY T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME ASC, T2.DISTRICT_NAME ASC
evidence: Select `dim_state`.`state_name`, `dim_state`.`country_id`, `dim_district`.`district_name`, `dim_location`.`ulb_rlb_village_name` from `dim_state` join `dim_district` on `dim_state`.`state_id` = `dim_district`.`state_id` join `dim_location` on `dim_district`.`district_id` = `dim_location`.`district_id` group by `dim_state`.`state_name`, `dim_state`.`country_id`, `dim_district`.`district_name`, `dim_location`.`ulb_rlb_village_name` order by `dim_location`.`ulb_rlb_village_name`, `dim_district`.`district_name`.

question: आंध्र प्रदेश राज्य के लिए, जिला नामों और विभिन्न शहरी/ग्रामीण स्थानीय निकाय गाँव के नामों की गणना को सूचीबद्ध करें, जिला नाम के अनुसार समूहीकृत और गाँवों की सबसे अधिक गणना के अनुसार क्रमबद्ध, केवल शीर्ष 10 परिणाम दिखाएँ।
sql: SELECT T2.DISTRICT_NAME, COUNT(DISTINCT T3.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME) FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID JOIN DIM_LOCATION AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Andhra Pradesh' GROUP BY T2.DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT T3.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME) DESC LIMIT 10
evidence: Filter `dim_state.state_name` = 'Andhra Pradesh'. Join `dim_district` on `dim_state.state_id` = `dim_district.state_id`. Join `dim_location` on `dim_district.district_id` = `dim_location.district_id`. Group by `dim_district.district_name`. Count distinct `dim_location.ulb_rlb_village_name` as village_count. Order by village_count DESC. Limit 10.

question: 'बिहार' राज्य के लिए, प्रत्येक जिले का नाम और अलग-अलग ULB/RLB गाँव के नामों की कुल गिनती सूचीबद्ध करें, यह सुनिश्चित करते हुए कि केवल उन जिलों को शामिल किया जाए जहाँ शून्य से अधिक गाँव हैं, और सबसे अधिक गिनती वाले शीर्ष 10 जिलों को प्रदर्शित करें।
sql: SELECT T2.DISTRICT_NAME, COUNT(DISTINCT T3.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME) FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID JOIN DIM_LOCATION AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Bihar' GROUP BY T2.DISTRICT_NAME HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT T3.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME) > 0 ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT T3.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME) DESC LIMIT 10
evidence: Filter `dim_state`.`state_name` = 'Bihar'. Join `dim_state` to `dim_district` on `dim_state`.`state_id` = `dim_district`.`state_id`. Join `dim_district` to `dim_location` on `dim_district`.`district_id` = `dim_location`.`district_id`. For each district, count distinct `dim_location`.`ulb_rlb_village_name`. Include only districts with count > 0. Order by count descending, limit 10. Output columns: `dim_district`.`district_name` and the count.

question: राज्य का नाम, जिले का नाम, और ULB/RLB गाँव का नाम सूचीबद्ध करें, राज्य, जिले और गाँव के नाम के अनुसार समूहीकृत करें, और गाँव के नाम के अनुसार वर्णानुक्रम में व्यवस्थित करें।
sql: SELECT T3.STATE_NAME, T2.DISTRICT_NAME, T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_STATE AS T3 ON T2.STATE_ID = T3.STATE_ID GROUP BY T3.STATE_NAME, T2.DISTRICT_NAME, T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME ORDER BY T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME;
evidence: List distinct `dim_state.state_name`, `dim_district.district_name`, `dim_location.ulb_rlb_village_name` by joining `dim_state`, `dim_district`, `dim_location` on state_id and district_id. Order by `dim_location.ulb_rlb_village_name` alphabetically.

question: असम, आंध्र प्रदेश या बिहार राज्यों में स्थित स्थानों के लिए, प्रकाशम जिले को छोड़कर, राज्य, जिला और गाँव के नाम के अनुसार समूहीकृत करें और गाँव तथा जिले के नाम के अनुसार वर्णानुक्रम में क्रमबद्ध करें।
sql: SELECT T3.STATE_NAME, T2.DISTRICT_NAME, T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID INNER JOIN DIM_STATE AS T3 ON T2.STATE_ID = T3.STATE_ID WHERE T3.STATE_NAME IN ('Assam', 'Andhra Pradesh', 'Bihar') AND T2.DISTRICT_NAME NOT IN ('Prakasam') GROUP BY T3.STATE_NAME, T2.DISTRICT_NAME, T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME ORDER BY T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME ASC, T2.DISTRICT_NAME ASC
evidence: Filter `dim_state`.`state_name` IN ('Assam', 'Andhra Pradesh', 'Bihar') and exclude `dim_district`.`district_name` = 'Prakasam'. Group by `dim_state`.`state_name`, `dim_district`.`district_name`, `dim_location`.`ulb_rlb_village_name`. Order by `dim_location`.`ulb_rlb_village_name`, `dim_district`.`district_name`.

question: 'चित्तूर' नामक जिले के लिए, उप-जिलों के नाम और यूएलबी/आरएलबी गाँवों के नाम सूचीबद्ध करें, 'प्रकाशम' जिले में भी मौजूद किसी भी उप-जिले को छोड़कर, उप-जिले और गाँव के नाम के अनुसार समूहीकृत करें और गाँव के नाम के अनुसार क्रमबद्ध करें।
sql: SELECT T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T2.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_LOCATION AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.DISTRICT_NAME = 'Chittoor' AND T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME NOT IN (SELECT T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_LOCATION AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.DISTRICT_NAME = 'Prakasam') GROUP BY T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T2.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME ORDER BY T2.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME
evidence: List `dim_location.sub_district_name` and `dim_location.ulb_rlb_village_name` for all locations in the district with `dim_district.district_name` = 'Chittoor', excluding any sub-district that also exists in the district with `dim_district.district_name` = 'Prakasam'. Group by `dim_location.sub_district_name` and `dim_location.ulb_rlb_village_name`, then order by `dim_location.ulb_rlb_village_name`.

question: 'चित्तूर' जिले में स्थित उप-जिला नाम और यूएलबी/आरएलबी गाँव के नाम सूचीबद्ध करें, जिसमें 'प्रकाशम' जिले में भी पाए जाने वाले किसी भी उप-जिले को शामिल न करें, उप-जिला और गाँव के नाम के अनुसार समूहीकृत करें और उप-जिला के अनुसार वर्णानुक्रम में व्यवस्थित करें।
sql: SELECT T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T2.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_LOCATION AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.DISTRICT_NAME = 'Chittoor' AND T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME NOT IN (SELECT T4.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T3 JOIN DIM_LOCATION AS T4 ON T3.DISTRICT_ID = T4.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T3.DISTRICT_NAME = 'Prakasam') GROUP BY T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T2.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME ORDER BY T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ASC
evidence: List `dim_location.sub_district_name` and `dim_location.ulb_rlb_village_name` for locations where `dim_district.district_name` = 'Chittoor', excluding sub-districts that also appear in `dim_district.district_name` = 'Prakasam'. Group by `dim_location.sub_district_name`, `dim_location.ulb_rlb_village_name`. Order by `dim_location.sub_district_name`.

question: उन उप-जिला नामों की सूची बनाएं जिनमें 'ग्रामीण' और 'शहरी' दोनों क्षेत्र श्रेणियाँ शामिल हैं, यह सुनिश्चित करते हुए कि प्रत्येक उप-जिला नाम दिखाया जाए और परिणाम उप-जिला नाम के अनुसार वर्णानुक्रम में व्यवस्थित हों।
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_SECTOR_CATEGORY AS T3 ON T2.SECTOR_ID = T3.SECTOR_ID WHERE T3.SECTOR_CATEGORY = 'Rural' OR T3.SECTOR_CATEGORY = 'Urban' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT T3.SECTOR_CATEGORY) = 2 ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME
evidence: List `dim_location`.`sub_district_name` where there exists at least one record with `dim_sector_category`.`sector_category` = 'Rural' and at least one with 'Urban' for that sub-district. Use any fact table (e.g., `fact_establishment_totals`) to join `dim_location` and `dim_sector_category`. Group by `dim_location`.`sub_district_name` and filter groups having both sector categories. Order by `dim_location`.`sub_district_name` alphabetically.

question: उन उप-जिलों के नामों की सूची बनाएं, जो वर्णानुक्रम में क्रमबद्ध हों, जिनमें कम से कम एक क्षेत्र 'ग्रामीण' श्रेणी में और कम से कम एक क्षेत्र 'शहरी' श्रेणी में शामिल हो।
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_SECTOR_CATEGORY AS T3 ON T2.SECTOR_ID = T3.SECTOR_ID GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN T3.SECTOR_CATEGORY = 'Rural' THEN T3.SECTOR_CATEGORY END) > 0 AND COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN T3.SECTOR_CATEGORY = 'Urban' THEN T3.SECTOR_CATEGORY END) > 0 ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ASC
evidence: List `dim_location`.`sub_district_name` alphabetically where the sub-district has at least one record with `dim_sector_category`.`sector_category` = 'Rural' and at least one record with `dim_sector_category`.`sector_category` = 'Urban'. Join `dim_location` to any fact table (e.g., `fact_establishment_totals`) on `dim_location`.`location_id` = fact_table.`location_id`, then join `dim_sector_category` on fact_table.`sector_id` = `dim_sector_category`.`sector_id`. Group by `dim_location`.`sub_district_name` and filter groups having COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN `dim_sector_category`.`sector_category` = 'Rural' THEN 1 END) > 0 AND COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN `dim_sector_category`.`sector_category` = 'Urban' THEN 1 END) > 0. Order by `dim_location`.`sub_district_name`.

question: List the state name and the district name for all districts located in the states of 'Andhra Pradesh' or 'Assam', and sort the results by the state name.
sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, T2.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Andhra Pradesh' OR T1.STATE_NAME = 'Assam' ORDER BY T1.STATE_NAME
evidence: Join `dim_state` and `dim_district` on `dim_state`.`state_id` = `dim_district`.`state_id`. Filter where `dim_state`.`state_name` is 'Andhra Pradesh' or 'Assam'. Select `dim_state`.`state_name` and `dim_district`.`district_name`. Sort by `dim_state`.`state_name`.

question: राज्य के नाम और जिले के नाम सूचीबद्ध करें, जहाँ राज्य का नाम 'आंध्र प्रदेश' है या जिले का नाम 'चित्तूर' है, राज्य और जिले के अनुसार समूहीकृत करें, यह सुनिश्चित करते हुए कि केवल उन समूहों को शामिल किया जाए जिनमें कम से कम एक जिला आईडी हो, और परिणामों को राज्य के नाम के अनुसार वर्णमाला क्रम में क्रमबद्ध करें।
sql: SELECT T2.STATE_NAME, T3.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_COUNTRY AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.COUNTRY_ID = T2.COUNTRY_ID LEFT JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.STATE_ID = T3.STATE_ID WHERE T2.STATE_NAME = 'Andhra Pradesh' OR T3.DISTRICT_NAME = 'Chittoor' GROUP BY T2.STATE_NAME, T3.DISTRICT_NAME HAVING COUNT(T3.DISTRICT_ID) >= 1 ORDER BY T2.STATE_NAME ASC
evidence: Join `dim_state` and `dim_district` on `dim_state.state_id` = `dim_district.state_id`. Filter where `dim_state.state_name` = 'Andhra Pradesh' OR `dim_district.district_name` = 'Chittoor'. Group by `dim_state.state_name`, `dim_district.district_name`. Ensure each group has at least one district ID: HAVING COUNT(`dim_district.district_id`) >= 1. Order by `dim_state.state_name` ASC.

question: जनगणना वर्ष 2013 और 'ग्रामीण' श्रेणी के क्षेत्रों के लिए, अनुमानित पशुधन मूल्य और अनुमानित मत्स्य पालन एवं जलकृषि मूल्य क्या हैं, जो जनगणना वर्ष के अनुसार अवरोही क्रम में व्यवस्थित हैं?
sql: SELECT T1.EST_LIVESTOCK, T1.EST_FISHING_AQUACULTURE FROM FACT_PRIMARY_SECTOR AS T1 JOIN DIM_SECTOR_CATEGORY AS T2 ON T1.SECTOR_ID = T2.SECTOR_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T1.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T2.SECTOR_CATEGORY = 'Rural' AND T3.CENSUS_YEAR = '2013' ORDER BY T3.CENSUS_YEAR DESC
evidence: Select `fact_primary_sector`.`est_livestock` and `fact_primary_sector`.`est_fishing_aquaculture` from `fact_primary_sector` join `dim_time` on `fact_primary_sector`.`time_id` = `dim_time`.`time_id` join `dim_sector_category` on `fact_primary_sector`.`sector_id` = `dim_sector_category`.`sector_id` where `dim_time`.`census_year` = 2013 and `dim_sector_category`.`sector_category` = 'Rural' order by `dim_time`.`census_year` DESC.

question: उपलब्ध सबसे हाल की जनगणना वर्ष के लिए, 'ग्रामीण' श्रेणी में वर्गीकृत क्षेत्रों के लिए कुल अनुमानित पशुधन और कुल अनुमानित मत्स्य पालन क्या है, विशेष रूप से उस वर्ष के लिए जहाँ पशुधन और मत्स्य पालन का संयुक्त योग शून्य से अधिक है, साथ ही जनगणना वर्ष भी प्रदर्शित करते हुए?
sql: SELECT SUM(T1.EST_LIVESTOCK), SUM(T1.EST_FISHING_AQUACULTURE) FROM FACT_PRIMARY_SECTOR AS T1 JOIN DIM_SECTOR_CATEGORY AS T2 ON T1.SECTOR_ID = T2.SECTOR_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T1.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T2.SECTOR_CATEGORY = 'Rural' AND T3.CENSUS_YEAR = (SELECT MAX(CENSUS_YEAR) FROM DIM_TIME) GROUP BY T3.CENSUS_YEAR HAVING SUM(T1.EST_LIVESTOCK + T1.EST_FISHING_AQUACULTURE) > 0.000 ORDER BY T3.CENSUS_YEAR DESC
evidence: Find the maximum `dim_time`.`census_year`. For that year, filter `dim_sector_category`.`sector_category` = 'Rural'. Sum `fact_primary_sector`.`est_livestock` and `fact_primary_sector`.`est_fishing_aquaculture` separately, but only include records where (`fact_primary_sector`.`est_livestock` + `fact_primary_sector`.`est_fishing_aquaculture`) > 0. Display the census year and the two sums.

question: प्रत्येक जनगणना वर्ष के लिए, जनगणना वर्ष स्वयं और कृषि, पशुधन तथा मत्स्य पालन के कुल अनुमान, विशेष रूप से 'ग्रामीण' क्षेत्र श्रेणी के लिए, वर्ष के अनुसार क्रमबद्ध करें।
sql: SELECT T2.CENSUS_YEAR, SUM(T1.EST_AGRICULTURE), SUM(T1.EST_LIVESTOCK), SUM(T1.EST_FISHING_AQUACULTURE) FROM FACT_PRIMARY_SECTOR AS T1 JOIN DIM_TIME AS T2 ON T1.TIME_ID = T2.TIME_ID JOIN DIM_SECTOR_CATEGORY AS T3 ON T1.SECTOR_ID = T3.SECTOR_ID WHERE T3.SECTOR_CATEGORY = 'Rural' GROUP BY T2.CENSUS_YEAR ORDER BY T2.CENSUS_YEAR
evidence: Sum `fact_primary_sector`.`est_agriculture`, `fact_primary_sector`.`est_livestock`, and `fact_primary_sector`.`est_fishing_aquaculture` for each `dim_time`.`census_year` where `dim_sector_category`.`sector_category` = 'Rural'. Group by `dim_time`.`census_year` and order by `dim_time`.`census_year`.

question: जनगणना वर्ष 2013 के लिए, उन क्षेत्र श्रेणियों की सूची बनाएं जहाँ प्रतिष्ठानों की कुल संख्या 50,000 से अधिक है, विशेष रूप से उन रिकॉर्ड्स को फ़िल्टर करें जहाँ आवासीय या वाणिज्यिक स्थिति 0.000 है, और परिणामी क्षेत्र श्रेणियों को अवरोही क्रम में क्रमबद्ध करें।
sql: SELECT T2.SECTOR_CATEGORY FROM FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS AS T1 JOIN DIM_SECTOR_CATEGORY AS T2 ON T1.SECTOR_ID = T2.SECTOR_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T1.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T3.CENSUS_YEAR = '2013' AND T1.EST_RESIDENTIAL_COMMERCIAL = 0.000 GROUP BY T2.SECTOR_CATEGORY HAVING SUM(T1.TOTAL_ESTABLISHMENTS) > 50000 ORDER BY T2.SECTOR_CATEGORY DESC
evidence: Filter records where `dim_time`.`census_year` = 2013, `fact_establishment_totals`.`total_establishments` > 50000, and `fact_establishment_totals`.`est_residential_commercial` = 0.000. Join `fact_establishment_totals` with `dim_time` on `time_id` and with `dim_sector_category` on `sector_id`. Select distinct `dim_sector_category`.`sector_category` and sort descending.

question: उपलब्ध सबसे हाल की समय अवधि के लिए, उन क्षेत्र श्रेणियों की सूची बनाएं जहाँ कुल प्रतिष्ठानों की संख्या 50,000 से अधिक है, विशेष रूप से उन रिकॉर्ड्स के लिए जहाँ आवासीय या वाणिज्यिक स्थिति 0.000 है, और परिणामों को कुल प्रतिष्ठानों की संख्या के अनुसार अवरोही क्रम में व्यवस्थित करें।
sql: SELECT T2.SECTOR_CATEGORY FROM FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS AS T1 JOIN DIM_SECTOR_CATEGORY AS T2 ON T1.SECTOR_ID = T2.SECTOR_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T1.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T3.TIME_ID = (SELECT MAX(TIME_ID) FROM DIM_TIME) AND T1.EST_RESIDENTIAL_COMMERCIAL = 0.000 GROUP BY T2.SECTOR_CATEGORY HAVING SUM(T1.TOTAL_ESTABLISHMENTS) > 50000 ORDER BY SUM(T1.TOTAL_ESTABLISHMENTS) DESC
evidence: Retrieve `dim_sector_category.sector_category` and `fact_establishment_totals.total_establishments` for the maximum `dim_time.census_year` (most recent time period), where `fact_establishment_totals.total_establishments` > 50000 and `fact_establishment_totals.est_residential_commercial` = 0. Join `fact_establishment_totals` with `dim_sector_category` on `sector_id` and with `dim_time` on `time_id`. Order results by `fact_establishment_totals.total_establishments` DESC.

question: प्रत्येक जनगणना वर्ष के लिए, जनगणना वर्ष और कुल अनुमानित मत्स्य पालन और जलकृषि मूल्य को सूचीबद्ध करें, कुल अनुमानित मत्स्य पालन और जलकृषि मूल्य के अनुसार अवरोही क्रम में क्रमबद्ध करें।
sql: SELECT T2.CENSUS_YEAR, SUM(T1.EST_FISHING_AQUACULTURE) FROM FACT_PRIMARY_SECTOR AS T1 JOIN DIM_TIME AS T2 ON T1.TIME_ID = T2.TIME_ID GROUP BY T2.CENSUS_YEAR ORDER BY SUM(T1.EST_FISHING_AQUACULTURE) DESC
evidence: Query requires grouping by `dim_time`.`census_year` and summing `fact_primary_sector`.`est_fishing_aquaculture` across all locations/sectors, then sorting descending by total estimated fishing aquaculture value.

question: जनगणना वर्ष और प्रत्येक वर्ष के लिए कुल अनुमानित मत्स्य पालन की सूची बनाएं, यह सुनिश्चित करते हुए कि कुल कम से कम 0.000 हो, और परिणामों को कुल अनुमानित मत्स्य पालन के अनुसार अवरोही क्रम में व्यवस्थित करें।
sql: SELECT T2.CENSUS_YEAR, SUM(T1.EST_FISHING_AQUACULTURE) FROM FACT_PRIMARY_SECTOR AS T1 JOIN DIM_TIME AS T2 ON T1.TIME_ID = T2.TIME_ID JOIN DIM_LOCATION AS T3 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T3.LOCATION_ID GROUP BY T2.CENSUS_YEAR HAVING SUM(T1.EST_FISHING_AQUACULTURE) >= 0.000 ORDER BY SUM(T1.EST_FISHING_AQUACULTURE) DESC
evidence: Sum `fact_primary_sector`.`est_fishing_aquaculture` for each `dim_time`.`census_year`. Join `fact_primary_sector` and `dim_time` on `time_id`. Group by `dim_time`.`census_year`. Filter where sum >= 0.000. Order by sum descending.

question: उन शीर्ष 5 रिकॉर्ड्स के लिए अनुमानित मत्स्य पालन मूल्य और जनगणना वर्ष सूचीबद्ध करें जहाँ अनुमानित मत्स्य पालन 0.000 है, जनगणना वर्ष के अनुसार अवरोही क्रम में व्यवस्थित।
sql: SELECT T1.EST_FISHING_AQUACULTURE, T2.CENSUS_YEAR FROM FACT_PRIMARY_SECTOR AS T1 JOIN DIM_TIME AS T2 ON T1.TIME_ID = T2.TIME_ID WHERE T1.EST_FISHING_AQUACULTURE = 0.000 ORDER BY T2.CENSUS_YEAR DESC LIMIT 5
evidence: Select `fact_primary_sector`.`est_fishing_aquaculture` and `dim_time`.`census_year` from `fact_primary_sector` join `dim_time` on `fact_primary_sector`.`time_id` = `dim_time`.`time_id` where `fact_primary_sector`.`est_fishing_aquaculture` = 0 order by `dim_time`.`census_year` desc limit 5.

question: जनगणना वर्ष और प्रत्येक वर्ष के लिए कुल अनुमानित मत्स्य पालन को सूचीबद्ध करें, विशेष रूप से 'ग्रामीण' क्षेत्र श्रेणी के लिए, कुल अनुमानित मत्स्य पालन के अनुसार अवरोही क्रम में व्यवस्थित करें, केवल शीर्ष 5 परिणाम दिखाएं।
sql: SELECT T1.CENSUS_YEAR, SUM(T2.EST_FISHING_AQUACULTURE) FROM DIM_TIME AS T1 JOIN FACT_PRIMARY_SECTOR AS T2 ON T1.TIME_ID = T2.TIME_ID JOIN DIM_SECTOR_CATEGORY AS T3 ON T2.SECTOR_ID = T3.SECTOR_ID WHERE T3.SECTOR_CATEGORY = 'Rural' GROUP BY T1.CENSUS_YEAR ORDER BY SUM(T2.EST_FISHING_AQUACULTURE) DESC LIMIT 5
evidence: Retrieve `dim_time`.`census_year` and sum of `fact_primary_sector`.`est_fishing_aquaculture` for each year, filtered by `dim_sector_category`.`sector_category` = 'Rural'. Join `fact_primary_sector` with `dim_sector_category` on `sector_id` and with `dim_time` on `time_id`. Group by `dim_time`.`census_year`. Order by total estimated fishing aquaculture descending. Limit to top 5 results.

question: उन ULB, RLB या गांवों के नाम वर्णानुक्रम में सूचीबद्ध करें, जहाँ पशुधन प्रतिष्ठानों की कुल संख्या शून्य से अधिक हो, विशेष रूप से उन स्थानों को फ़िल्टर करते हुए जहाँ व्यक्तिगत पशुधन प्रतिष्ठानों की गणना शून्य से अधिक हो और आवासीय-व्यावसायिक प्रतिष्ठानों की गणना ठीक शून्य हो।
sql: SELECT T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_PRIMARY_SECTOR AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS AS T3 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T3.LOCATION_ID WHERE T2.EST_LIVESTOCK > 0.000 AND T3.EST_RESIDENTIAL_COMMERCIAL = 0.000 GROUP BY T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.EST_LIVESTOCK) > 0.000 ORDER BY T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME ASC
evidence: List `dim_location`.`ulb_rlb_village_name` in alphabetical order where `fact_primary_sector`.`est_livestock` > 0 and `fact_establishment_totals`.`est_residential_commercial` = 0.

question: 2013 की जनगणना के लिए, उन स्थानों के लिए उप-जिला नाम और यूएलबी/आरएलबी गाँव के नाम सूचीबद्ध करें जहाँ अनुमानित पशुधन गणना शून्य से अधिक है, उन स्थानों को छोड़कर जहाँ 2013 में अनुमानित आवासीय-व्यावसायिक गणना भी शून्य से अधिक थी, उनके उप-जिला और गाँव के नामों के अनुसार समूहीकृत करें और उप-जिला के अनुसार वर्णानुक्रम में क्रमबद्ध करें।
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_PRIMARY_SECTOR AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T3.CENSUS_YEAR = '2013' AND T2.EST_LIVESTOCK > 0.000 AND T1.LOCATION_ID NOT IN ( SELECT T4.LOCATION_ID FROM FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS AS T4 JOIN DIM_TIME AS T5 ON T4.TIME_ID = T5.TIME_ID WHERE T5.CENSUS_YEAR = '2013' AND T4.EST_RESIDENTIAL_COMMERCIAL > 0.000 ) GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME HAVING COUNT(T2.FACT_PRIMARY_SECTOR_ID) >= 1 ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ASC
evidence: List `dim_location.sub_district_name` and `dim_location.ulb_rlb_village_name` for locations where `dim_time.census_year` = 2013 and `fact_primary_sector.est_livestock` > 0, excluding locations where `fact_establishment_totals.est_residential_commercial` > 0. Group by `dim_location.sub_district_name` and `dim_location.ulb_rlb_village_name`. Order by `dim_location.sub_district_name` alphabetically.

question: 2013 की जनगणना वर्ष के लिए, उप-जिला नाम और यूएलबी/आरएलबी गांव के नाम सूचीबद्ध करें जहाँ मत्स्य पालन और जलकृषि प्रतिष्ठानों की संख्या 0 या अधिक है और आवासीय वाणिज्यिक प्रतिष्ठानों की संख्या 0 या अधिक है, यह सुनिश्चित करते हुए कि केवल उन स्थानों को शामिल किया जाए जहाँ प्रतिष्ठान कुल में कम से कम एक रिकॉर्ड है, और परिणामों को उप-जिला नाम के अनुसार वर्णानुक्रम में क्रमबद्ध करें।
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN FACT_PRIMARY_SECTOR AS T3 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T3.LOCATION_ID AND T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T4 ON T2.TIME_ID = T4.TIME_ID WHERE T3.EST_FISHING_AQUACULTURE >= 0.000 AND T2.EST_RESIDENTIAL_COMMERCIAL >= 0.000 AND T4.CENSUS_YEAR = '2013' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME HAVING COUNT(T2.FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS_ID) >= 1 ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ASC
evidence: Select `dim_location.sub_district_name` and `dim_location.ulb_rlb_village_name` for `dim_time.census_year` = 2013 where `fact_primary_sector.est_fishing_aquaculture` >= 0 and `fact_establishment_totals.est_residential_commercial` >= 0 and `fact_establishment_totals.total_establishments` >= 1, sorted by `dim_location.sub_district_name` ASC.

question: List the ULB RLB village names, sorted alphabetically, for locations where the number of forestry and logging establishments is greater than zero or the number of residential and commercial establishments is greater than zero.
sql: SELECT T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN FACT_PRIMARY_SECTOR AS T3 ON T2.LOCATION_ID = T3.LOCATION_ID WHERE T3.EST_FORESTRY_LOGGING > 0.000 OR T2.EST_RESIDENTIAL_COMMERCIAL > 0.000 GROUP BY T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME ORDER BY T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME ASC
evidence: Retrieve distinct `dim_location.ulb_rlb_village_name` sorted alphabetically where `fact_primary_sector.est_forestry_logging > 0` OR `fact_establishment_totals.est_residential_commercial > 0`. Join `dim_location` to `fact_primary_sector` and `fact_establishment_totals` on `location_id`.

question: 2013 की जनगणना वर्ष के लिए, उन क्षेत्रों के लिए उप-जिला नाम और यूएलबी/आरएलबी गाँव के नाम सूचीबद्ध करें जहाँ वानिकी और लॉगिंग प्रतिष्ठानों की संख्या 0 से अधिक है या आवासीय/वाणिज्यिक प्रतिष्ठानों की संख्या 0 से अधिक है, यह सुनिश्चित करते हुए कि कम से कम एक प्रतिष्ठान रिकॉर्ड मौजूद हो, और परिणामों को उप-जिला नाम के अनुसार वर्णानुक्रम में क्रमबद्ध करें।
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID LEFT JOIN FACT_PRIMARY_SECTOR AS T4 ON T2.LOCATION_ID = T4.LOCATION_ID AND T2.TIME_ID = T4.TIME_ID WHERE T3.CENSUS_YEAR = '2013' AND (T4.EST_FORESTRY_LOGGING > 0.000 OR T2.EST_RESIDENTIAL_COMMERCIAL > 0.000) GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME HAVING COUNT(T2.FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS_ID) >= 1 ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ASC
evidence: List `dim_location.sub_district_name` and `dim_location.ulb_rlb_village_name` for `dim_time.census_year` = 2013 where (`fact_primary_sector.est_forestry_logging` > 0 OR `fact_establishment_totals.est_residential_commercial` > 0) AND `fact_establishment_totals.total_establishments` > 0. Join `dim_location` to `fact_primary_sector` and `fact_establishment_totals` on `location_id` and `time_id` (via `dim_time`). Order by `dim_location.sub_district_name` alphabetically.

question: List the sub-district name and the census year, along with the sum of total establishments and the sum of residential-commercial establishments, grouped by both sub-district and census year, and ordered chronologically by the census year.
sql: SELECT T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T3.CENSUS_YEAR, SUM(T1.TOTAL_ESTABLISHMENTS), SUM(T1.EST_RESIDENTIAL_COMMERCIAL) FROM FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS AS T1 JOIN DIM_LOCATION AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T1.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID GROUP BY T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T3.CENSUS_YEAR ORDER BY T3.CENSUS_YEAR ASC
evidence: Select `dim_location`.`sub_district_name`, `dim_time`.`census_year`, SUM(`fact_establishment_totals`.`total_establishments`) as sum_total_establishments, SUM(`fact_establishment_totals`.`est_residential_commercial`) as sum_residential_commercial from `fact_establishment_totals` join `dim_location` on `fact_establishment_totals`.`location_id` = `dim_location`.`location_id` join `dim_time` on `fact_establishment_totals`.`time_id` = `dim_time`.`time_id` group by `dim_location`.`sub_district_name`, `dim_time`.`census_year` order by `dim_time`.`census_year`

question: उन सभी रिकॉर्ड्स के लिए उप-जिला नाम और जनगणना वर्ष, कुल प्रतिष्ठानों की संख्या और आवासीय-व्यावसायिक प्रतिष्ठानों के योग की सूची बनाएं, जहाँ कुल प्रतिष्ठानों की संख्या शून्य से अधिक हो, जनगणना वर्ष और कुल प्रतिष्ठानों के अनुसार अवरोही क्रम में व्यवस्थित करें।
sql: SELECT T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T3.CENSUS_YEAR, SUM(T1.TOTAL_ESTABLISHMENTS), SUM(T1.EST_RESIDENTIAL_COMMERCIAL) FROM FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_LOCATION AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID INNER JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T1.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID GROUP BY T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T3.CENSUS_YEAR HAVING SUM(T1.TOTAL_ESTABLISHMENTS) > 0.000 ORDER BY T3.CENSUS_YEAR DESC, SUM(T1.TOTAL_ESTABLISHMENTS) DESC
evidence: Select `dim_location`.`sub_district_name`, `dim_time`.`census_year`, `fact_establishment_totals`.`total_establishments`, `fact_establishment_totals`.`est_residential_commercial` from `fact_establishment_totals` join `dim_location` on `fact_establishment_totals`.`location_id` = `dim_location`.`location_id` join `dim_time` on `fact_establishment_totals`.`time_id` = `dim_time`.`time_id` where `fact_establishment_totals`.`total_establishments` > 0 order by `dim_time`.`census_year` desc, `fact_establishment_totals`.`total_establishments` desc.

question: 2013 की जनगणना वर्ष के लिए प्रत्येक उप-जिले का नाम और अनुमानित आवासीय और वाणिज्यिक प्रतिष्ठानों का कुल योग, उप-जिले के नाम के अनुसार समूहीकृत और उच्चतम कुल योग से निम्नतम के क्रम में व्यवस्थित करें।
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T2.EST_RESIDENTIAL_COMMERCIAL) FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T3.CENSUS_YEAR = '2013' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T2.EST_RESIDENTIAL_COMMERCIAL) DESC
evidence: Filter `dim_time`.`census_year` = 2013. Join `fact_establishment_totals` with `dim_time` on `fact_establishment_totals`.`time_id` = `dim_time`.`time_id` and with `dim_location` on `fact_establishment_totals`.`location_id` = `dim_location`.`location_id`. question: उपलब्ध नवीनतम जनगणना वर्ष के लिए, प्रत्येक उप-जिला नाम और अनुमानित आवासीय व्यावसायिक प्रतिष्ठानों के कुल योग को सूचीबद्ध करें, उन रिकॉर्ड्स को फ़िल्टर करें जहाँ अनुमानित आवासीय व्यावसायिक मूल्य 0.000 है, और परिणामों को योग के अनुसार अवरोही क्रम में क्रमबद्ध करें।

sql: SELECT T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_SECONDARY_SECTOR AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T3.TIME_ID = (SELECT MAX(TIME_ID) FROM DIM_TIME) GROUP BY T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.EST_MANUFACTURING) > 50 ORDER BY SUM(T2.EST_MANUFACTURING) DESC
evidence: Filter for the latest `dim_time`.`census_year` (2013) and `dim_sector_category`.`sector_category` = 'Urban'. Join `fact_secondary_sector` with `dim_location` on `location_id`, with `dim_sector_category` on `sector_id`, and with `dim_time` on `time_id`. Select `dim_location`.`ulb_rlb_village_name` and `fact_secondary_sector`.`est_manufacturing` where `fact_secondary_sector`.`est_manufacturing` > 50. Order by `fact_secondary_sector`.`est_manufacturing` DESC.

question: जनगणना वर्ष 2013 के लिए, प्रत्येक उप-जिले का नाम और कुल अनुमानित विनिर्माण मूल्य सूचीबद्ध करें, जो कुल अनुमानित विनिर्माण के अनुसार अवरोही क्रम में क्रमबद्ध हो।
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T2.EST_MANUFACTURING) FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_SECONDARY_SECTOR AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T3.CENSUS_YEAR = '2013' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T2.EST_MANUFACTURING) DESC
evidence: Filter `dim_time`.`census_year` = 2013. Join `fact_secondary_sector` with `dim_time` on `time_id` and with `dim_location` on `location_id`. Group by `dim_location`.`sub_district_name` and sum `fact_secondary_sector`.`est_manufacturing` as total_manufacturing. Order by total_manufacturing DESC.

question: नवीनतम उपलब्ध जनगणना वर्ष के लिए, प्रत्येक उप-जिला नाम और कुल अनुमानित विनिर्माण मूल्य को उच्चतम से निम्नतम कुल अनुमानित विनिर्माण के क्रम में सूचीबद्ध करें।
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T2.EST_MANUFACTURING) FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_SECONDARY_SECTOR AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T3.CENSUS_YEAR = (SELECT MAX(CENSUS_YEAR) FROM DIM_TIME) GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T2.EST_MANUFACTURING) DESC
evidence: For the latest census year (2013), list each sub-district name (`dim_location.sub_district_name`) and the total estimated manufacturing value (sum of `fact_secondary_sector.est_manufacturing`) per sub-district, ordered from highest to lowest total estimated manufacturing. Join `fact_secondary_sector` with `dim_location` on `location_id` and with `dim_time` on `time_id`. Filter where `dim_time.census_year` = 2013. Group by `dim_location.sub_district_name`. Order by sum(`fact_secondary_sector.est_manufacturing`) DESC.

question: 2013 के जनगणना वर्ष के लिए शीर्ष 10 उप-जिलों के नाम और उनके कुल अनुमानित विनिर्माण मूल्य को कुल अनुमानित विनिर्माण के अवरोही क्रम में सूचीबद्ध करें।
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T2.EST_MANUFACTURING) FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_SECONDARY_SECTOR AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T3.CENSUS_YEAR = '2013' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T2.EST_MANUFACTURING) DESC LIMIT 10
evidence: Select `dim_location`.`sub_district_name` and `fact_secondary_sector`.`est_manufacturing` from `fact_secondary_sector` join `dim_location` on `fact_secondary_sector`.`location_id` = `dim_location`.`location_id` join `dim_time` on `fact_secondary_sector`.`time_id` = `dim_time`.`time_id` where `dim_time`.`census_year` = 2013 order by `fact_secondary_sector`.`est_manufacturing` DESC limit 10.

question: उपलब्ध नवीनतम जनगणना वर्ष के लिए, उप-जिला नाम और कुल अनुमानित विनिर्माण मूल्य के लिए शीर्ष 10 उप-जिलों की सूची बनाएं, जिनका कुल विनिर्माण सबसे अधिक है, उनके उप-जिला नाम के अनुसार समूहीकृत।
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T2.EST_MANUFACTURING) FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_SECONDARY_SECTOR AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T3.CENSUS_YEAR = (SELECT MAX(CENSUS_YEAR) FROM DIM_TIME) GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T2.EST_MANUFACTURING) DESC LIMIT 10
evidence: Retrieve the top 10 sub-districts by total estimated manufacturing for the latest census year (2013). Group by `dim_location`.`sub_district_name`, sum `fact_secondary_sector`.`est_manufacturing` as total_manufacturing. Join `fact_secondary_sector` with `dim_location` on `location_id` and with `dim_time` on `time_id`. Filter where `dim_time`.`census_year` = 2013. Order by total_manufacturing descending, limit 10.

question: 2013 के जनगणना वर्ष के लिए, प्रत्येक उप-जिले का नाम उसके कुल अनुमानित विनिर्माण और कुल अनुमानित निर्माण मूल्यों के साथ सूचीबद्ध करें, जो उप-जिले के नाम के अनुसार वर्णानुक्रम में समूहीकृत और क्रमबद्ध हों।
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T2.EST_MANUFACTURING), SUM(T2.EST_CONSTRUCTION) FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_SECONDARY_SECTOR AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T3.CENSUS_YEAR = '2013' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ASC
evidence: For `dim_time`.`census_year` = 2013, list each `dim_location`.`sub_district_name` with the sum of `fact_secondary_sector`.`est_manufacturing` and sum of `fact_secondary_sector`.`est_construction`, grouped by `dim_location`.`sub_district_name` and ordered alphabetically by `dim_location`.`sub_district_name`.

question: जनगणना वर्ष 2013 के लिए, प्रत्येक उप-जिले का नाम कुल अनुमानित विनिर्माण और कुल अनुमानित निर्माण मूल्यों के साथ सूचीबद्ध करें, यह सुनिश्चित करते हुए कि कुल अनुमानित विनिर्माण कम से कम 0.000 हो, और परिणामों को कुल अनुमानित विनिर्माण के अनुसार अवरोही क्रम में क्रमबद्ध करें।
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T2.EST_MANUFACTURING), SUM(T2.EST_CONSTRUCTION) FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_SECONDARY_SECTOR AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T3.CENSUS_YEAR = '2013' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.EST_MANUFACTURING) >= 0.000 ORDER BY SUM(T2.EST_MANUFACTURING) DESC
evidence: List each sub-district name (`dim_location`.`sub_district_name`) with total estimated manufacturing (sum(`fact_secondary_sector`.`est_manufacturing`)) and total estimated construction (sum(`fact_secondary_sector`.`est_construction`)) for census year 2013 (`dim_time`.`census_year` = 2013). Join `dim_location` on `fact_secondary_sector`.`location_id` = `dim_location`.`location_id`, and `dim_time` on `fact_secondary_sector`.`time_id` = `dim_time`.`time_id`. Group by `dim_location`.`sub_district_name`. Filter where sum(`fact_secondary_sector`.`est_manufacturing`) >= 0.000. Sort by sum(`fact_secondary_sector`.`est_manufacturing`) DESC.

question: 2013 के वर्ष के लिए उप-जिला नामों की सूची बनाएं जहाँ अनुमानित विनिर्माण मूल्य 0.000 से अधिक है और अनुमानित निर्माण मूल्य ठीक 0.000 है, विशेष रूप से उन उप-जिलों को फ़िल्टर करें जहाँ अनुमानित विनिर्माण का कुल योग 2.000 के बराबर है।
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_SECONDARY_SECTOR AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T3.CENSUS_YEAR = '2013' AND T2.EST_MANUFACTURING > 0.000 AND T2.EST_CONSTRUCTION = 0.000 GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.EST_MANUFACTURING) = 2.000
evidence: List `dim_location.sub_district_name` for `dim_time.census_year` = 2013 where `fact_secondary_sector.est_manufacturing` > 0.000 and `fact_secondary_sector.est_construction` = 0.000, grouped by `dim_location.sub_district_name` having SUM(`fact_secondary_sector.est_manufacturing`) = 2.000.

question: 2013 के जनगणना वर्ष के लिए उप-जिला नामों की सूची बनाएं, जहां कुल अनुमानित विनिर्माण 0 से अधिक है और कुल अनुमानित निर्माण ठीक 0 है, उप-जिला नाम के अनुसार वर्णमाला क्रम में समूहीकृत और क्रमबद्ध किया गया है।
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_SECONDARY_SECTOR AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T3.CENSUS_YEAR = '2013' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.EST_MANUFACTURING) > 0.000 AND SUM(T2.EST_CONSTRUCTION) = 0.000 ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ASC
evidence: List distinct `dim_location.sub_district_name` for `dim_time.census_year` = 2013 where `fact_secondary_sector.est_manufacturing` > 0 and `fact_secondary_sector.est_construction` = 0, grouped by `dim_location.sub_district_name` and ordered alphabetically by `dim_location.sub_district_name`.

question: जनगणना वर्ष 2013 के लिए, उन उप-जिलों के नाम सूचीबद्ध करें जिनका अनुमानित विनिर्माण मूल्य 0.000 से अधिक है और कम से कम एक द्वितीयक क्षेत्र रिकॉर्ड है, उप-जिले के नाम के अनुसार वर्णानुक्रम में व्यवस्थित।
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_SECONDARY_SECTOR AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T2.EST_MANUFACTURING > 0.000 AND T3.CENSUS_YEAR = '2013' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING COUNT(T2.FACT_SECONDARY_SECTOR_ID) > 0 ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ASC
evidence: List distinct `dim_location.sub_district_name` where `dim_time.census_year` = 2013 and `fact_secondary_sector.est_manufacturing` > 0.000, ordered by `dim_location.sub_district_name` ASC.

question: 2013 की जनगणना वर्ष में किन उप-जिलों के नामों में विनिर्माण प्रतिष्ठानों की सकारात्मक संख्या थी और उसी जनगणना वर्ष में निर्माण प्रतिष्ठानों की भी सकारात्मक संख्या थी?
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_SECONDARY_SECTOR AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T3.CENSUS_YEAR = '2013' AND T2.EST_MANUFACTURING > 0.000 INTERSECT SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_SECONDARY_SECTOR AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T3.CENSUS_YEAR = '2013' AND T2.EST_CONSTRUCTION > 0.000
evidence: Find `dim_location`.`sub_district_name` where `dim_time`.`census_year` = 2013, `fact_secondary_sector`.`est_manufacturing` > 0, and `fact_secondary_sector`.`est_construction` > 0. Join `dim_location` to `fact_secondary_sector` on `dim_location`.`location_id` = `fact_secondary_sector`.`location_id`, and join `dim_time` to `fact_secondary_sector` on `dim_time`.`time_id` = `fact_secondary_sector`.`time_id`.

question: 2013 की जनगणना के लिए उप-जिला नामों की सूची बनाएं जहां विनिर्माण प्रतिष्ठानों की संख्या 500 से अधिक है या निर्माण प्रतिष्ठानों की संख्या 200 से अधिक है, उप-जिला नाम के अनुसार समूहीकृत।
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_SECONDARY_SECTOR AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T3.CENSUS_YEAR = '2013' AND (T2.EST_MANUFACTURING > 500 OR T2.EST_CONSTRUCTION > 200) GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME
evidence: Select `dim_location`.`sub_district_name` for records where `dim_time`.`census_year` = '2013' and (`fact_secondary_sector`.`est_manufacturing` > 500 OR `fact_secondary_sector`.`est_construction` > 200), grouping by `dim_location`.`sub_district_name`.

question: 2013 की जनगणना के लिए उन उप-जिलों के नाम सूचीबद्ध करें जहाँ या तो कुल अनुमानित विनिर्माण 500 से अधिक है या कुल अनुमानित निर्माण 200 से अधिक है, और परिणामों को उप-जिला के नाम के अनुसार वर्णमाला क्रम में व्यवस्थित करें।
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_SECONDARY_SECTOR AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T3.CENSUS_YEAR = '2013' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.EST_MANUFACTURING) > 500 UNION SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_SECONDARY_SECTOR AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T3.CENSUS_YEAR = '2013' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.EST_CONSTRUCTION) > 200 ORDER BY SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ASC
evidence: Retrieve `dim_location.sub_district_name` for census year 2013 (where `dim_time.census_year` = 2013, which corresponds to `dim_time.time_id` = 1) from `fact_secondary_sector` where either `fact_secondary_sector.est_manufacturing` > 500 OR `fact_secondary_sector.est_construction` > 200, and order by `dim_location.sub_district_name` ASC.

question: उन स्थानों के लिए जहाँ अनुमानित आवास और भोजन व्यय शून्य से अधिक है, उप-जिला नाम और नगरपालिका, पंचायत या गाँव के नाम सूचीबद्ध करें, इन दो स्तंभों के आधार पर समूहित करें और उप-जिला के अनुसार वर्णानुक्रम में क्रमबद्ध करें।
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_TRANSPORT_HOSPITALITY AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID WHERE T2.EST_ACCOMMODATION_FOOD > 0.000 GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ASC
evidence: Select `dim_location`.`sub_district_name` and `dim_location`.`ulb_rlb_village_name` from `fact_transport_hospitality` join `dim_location` on `fact_transport_hospitality`.`location_id` = `dim_location`.`location_id` where `fact_transport_hospitality`.`est_accommodation_food` > 0 group by `dim_location`.`sub_district_name`, `dim_location`.`ulb_rlb_village_name` order by `dim_location`.`sub_district_name`.

question: 2013 की जनगणना वर्ष के लिए, उन उप-जिला नामों और ULB/RLB गाँव के नामों की सूची बनाएँ जहाँ कुल अनुमानित आवास और भोजन व्यय कम से कम 0.000 है, और परिणामों को उप-जिला नाम के अनुसार वर्णानुक्रम में क्रमबद्ध करें।
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_TRANSPORT_HOSPITALITY AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T3.CENSUS_YEAR = '2013' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.EST_ACCOMMODATION_FOOD) >= 0.000 ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ASC
evidence: Select `dim_location`.`sub_district_name` and `dim_location`.`ulb_rlb_village_name` from `fact_transport_hospitality` join `dim_location` on `fact_transport_hospitality`.`location_id` = `dim_location`.`location_id` join `dim_time` on `fact_transport_hospitality`.`time_id` = `dim_time`.`time_id` where `dim_time`.`census_year` = 2013 and `fact_transport_hospitality`.`est_accommodation_food` >= 0 order by `dim_location`.`sub_district_name` asc.

question: जनगणना वर्ष 2013 के लिए, प्रत्येक उप-जिले का नाम, कुल अनुमानित परिवहन एवं भंडारण लागत और कुल अनुमानित आवास एवं भोजन लागत के साथ, उप-जिले के नाम के अनुसार वर्णमाला क्रम में समूहीकृत और व्यवस्थित करें।
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T2.EST_TRANSPORT_STORAGE), SUM(T2.EST_ACCOMMODATION_FOOD) FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_TRANSPORT_HOSPITALITY AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T3.CENSUS_YEAR = '2013' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ASC
evidence: Filter by `dim_time.census_year` = '2013'. Select `dim_location.sub_district_name`, SUM(`fact_transport_hospitality.est_transport_storage`) as total_transport_storage, SUM(`fact_transport_hospitality.est_accommodation_food`) as total_accommodation_food. Join `fact_transport_hospitality` with `dim_location` on `location_id` and with `dim_time` on `time_id`. Group by `dim_location.sub_district_name` and order alphabetically by `dim_location.sub_district_name`.

question: उपलब्ध नवीनतम जनगणना वर्ष के लिए, उप-जिला नामों को कुल अनुमानित परिवहन और भंडारण लागत तथा कुल अनुमानित आवास और भोजन लागत के साथ सूचीबद्ध करें, जो उप-जिला द्वारा समूहीकृत हो और कुल अनुमानित परिवहन और भंडारण लागत के अनुसार अवरोही क्रम में व्यवस्थित हो।
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T2.EST_TRANSPORT_STORAGE), SUM(T2.EST_ACCOMMODATION_FOOD) FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_TRANSPORT_HOSPITALITY AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T3.CENSUS_YEAR = (SELECT MAX(CENSUS_YEAR) FROM DIM_TIME) GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T2.EST_TRANSPORT_STORAGE) DESC
evidence: Retrieve `dim_location.sub_district_name`, SUM(`fact_transport_hospitality.est_transport_storage`) as total_transport_storage, and SUM(`fact_transport_hospitality.est_accommodation_food`) as total_accommodation_food from `dim_location` JOIN `fact_transport_hospitality` ON `dim_location.location_id` = `fact_transport_hospitality.location_id` JOIN `dim_time` ON `fact_transport_hospitality.time_id` = `dim_time.time_id` WHERE `dim_time.census_year` = 2013 GROUP BY `dim_location.sub_district_name` ORDER BY total_transport_storage DESC.
